payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits SELECT queries and denies DELETE queries.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied"

memory_cards.statement: In admin SQL select-only mode, SELECT queries such as "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10" are allowed, while DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied.
